basic_details.job_title: CMET MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Junior Research Fellow, Research Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CMET Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow, Research Associate and More
basic_details.short_information: CMET Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (CMET MANIT Bhopal) Project Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 06-05-2026 on the official website of CMET MANIT Bhopal. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the CMET MANIT Bhopal Project Positions Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have completed 10th Pass, B.E./B.Tech, M.Tech/M.E. in Electrical Engineering (Power System / Power Electronics or equivalent), or MBA are eligible to apply for these Project Positions vacancies. The email application process for CMET MANIT Bhopal Project Positions Recruitment 2026 h

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, B.E./B.Tech, M.Tech/M.E. in Electrical Engineering (Power System / Power Electronics or equivalent), MBA
qualification.details: Senior Research Associate (SRA): M.Tech / M.E. in Electrical Engineering (Power System / Power Electronics or equivalent) Research Associate (RA): M.Tech / M.E. in Electrical Engineering (Power System / Power Electronics or equivalent) Senior Research Fellow (SRF): M.Tech / M.E. in Electrical Engineering (Power System / Power Electronics or equivalent) Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E. / B.Tech Program Director: M.Tech or MBA Ministerial Staff: 10th pass

salary_details.program director: Fixed monthly amount arrived at by deducting

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Personal interaction (interview) Original document verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMET MANIT Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CMET MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Project Positions at CMET MANIT Bhopal is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application is sent via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Positions at CMET MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for various Project Positions, including Senior Research Associate, Research Associate, Senior Research Fellow, Junior Research Fellow, Program Director, and Ministerial Staff.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for CMET MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Project Positions at CMET MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Positions ranges from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- per month, depending on the post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is a B.E. / B.Tech degree.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for CMET MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these Project Positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a personal interaction (interview), and finally, original document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for CMET MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Project Positions at CMET MANIT Bhopal is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the CMET Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (CMET MANIT Bhopal).
